BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was made to be a sex toy, rather than a human. During [PAWN_possessive] growing period, [PAWN_pronoun] was taught plenty of social and sex related skills to satisfy any demands of its owners.
BackstoryDef.title: Vat-Grown Carnal Thrall

BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has a pair of charming eyes, and [PAWN_possessive] voice is soft and sweet. Due to [PAWN_possessive] previous nurse job, [PAWN_pronoun] tends people quite well.
BackstoryDef.title: Tender Carnal Thrall

BackstoryDef.baseDesc: No one can be more loquacious than [PAWN_nameDef]. [PAWN_pronoun] has a flexible tongue, a sharp mind, and hot lips.
BackstoryDef.title: Chatty Carnal Thrall
BackstoryDef.workDisables: Animals, Artistic, Caring, Violent, ManualDumb, ManualSkilled

BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] suffered some terrible things, [PAWN_pronoun] looks rather emaciated.
BackstoryDef.title: Broken Carnal Thrall

BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained to be a housekeeper. Would you like dinner? A bath? Or perhaps... [PAWN_possessive]?
BackstoryDef.title: Homekeeper Carnal Thrall
BackstoryDef.workDisables: Animals, Violent, Artistic, Crafting, PlantWork, Mining, Intellectual
